name: Sleep Breath
description: The dragon exhales sleep gas in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or fall unconscious for 5 minutes. This effect ends for a creature if the creature takes damage or someone uses an action to wake it. (Recharge 5-6)

condition_instances.description: for 5 minutes. This effect ends for a creature if the creature takes damage or someone uses an action to wake it.
